description.zh-Hans: 生成六边形网格能量场，线条交叉点带辉光效果并支持基于脉冲的亮度调制。实现IMultiOutputNode以提供独立的图像和遮罩输出端口。
description.en: Generates a hexagonal-grid energy field with glow at line intersections and pulse-based brightness modulation. Implements IMultiOutputNode for separate image and mask ports.

triggers.zh-Hans: 能量场, 力场, 六边形, 防护罩, 科幻
triggers.en: energy field, force field, hexagonal grid, shield, sci-fi

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成六边形网格能量场效果，带辉光脉冲，可用于科幻场景的防护罩或能量屏障。
exampleUsage.en: Generates a hexagonal grid energy field with glow pulses for sci-fi force fields or energy barriers.
